This plant is native to South America and is also known as the violacea ditmaria. The classification of Ditmaria violacea is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Angiosperms), class (Rosidae), and order (Fabales). The plant is an herbaceous climber with compound leaves and small, pinkish-purple flowers. As a member of the Fabales order, Ditmaria violacea is closely related to other legume species.
